item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Tanpa pertimbangan terhadap hak individu, keadilan sosial justru bisa menjadi alasan untuk diskriminasi atau ketidakadilan.

notes: Agent A begins by agreeing with society-priority but repeatedly adds rights-protection caveats, then partially reasserts Indonesian collective-priority framing in the final turn. Agent B remains consistently rights-first, with only bounded acknowledgement that social justice matters. Both agents engage specific claims and move slightly toward balance without a full reversal.
